name: Peanut Butter Pinwheel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, pecan butter, brown sugar, and eggs together.
2. Sift in the flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well.
3. Divide the mixture into halves and roll each half out between layers of wax paper or saran wrap.
4. Melt 12 ounces of semisweet chocolate chips over hot water (do not boil).
5. Spread half of the melted chocolate evenly over one half of the cookie dough.
6. Roll up the filled half tightly, then place it in a plastic bag and chill thoroughly.
7. Repeat with the remaining half of the dough.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Slice rounds from each roll using a sharp knife.
10. Place the slices on an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake for 8-12 minutes, or until slightly browned on the bottom edges.
